title: You Need A Budget (YNAB) Connection Specification

api_key.description: YNAB personal access token, sent as a Bearer token (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Never logged.

base_url.description: YNAB API base URL override for tests or proxies.

budget_id.description: YNAB budget ID scoping the 'accounts' and 'transactions' streams; defaults to YNAB's 'last-used' budget alias.

since_date.description: Optional YYYY-MM-DD lower bound passed as the 'since_date' query param on 'accounts'/'transactions' reads.

limit.description: Optional 'limit' query param passed through verbatim on 'accounts'/'transactions' reads.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
